speaker: speaker1
text: Here is the fish counter . Look at the lobsters and crabs . Shall we have some ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I'm allergic to these things , you know .

speaker: speaker1
text: Sorry , I forgot . I don ’ t like seafood , neither .

speaker: speaker2
text: Let ’ s go over there and get some milk , a couple dozen eggs and some orange juice .

speaker: speaker1
text: Let's get frozen juice . It is really good . We ’ Ve got enough food . Let ’ s go over to the check-out stand .

speaker: speaker2
text: OK . But just let me pick up a bottle of cooking wine and oil as we go by .
